one.","kind":"dev","methods":{"expectedSupplyAssets(address)":{"details":"Accounts for internally tracked balance, ignoring direct shares transfer."},"lostAssets()":{"details":"In order to cover those If `fee()` is 0, then no fee shares are generated, so the protocol fee will have no effect regardless of its value."},"reallocate((address,uint256)[])":{"details":"The behavior of the reallocation can be altered by state changes, including: - Deposits on the Earn vault that supplies to vaults that are expected to be supplied to during reallocation. - Withdrawals from the Earn vault that withdraws from vaults that are expected to be withdrawn from during reallocation. - Donations to the vault on vaults that are expected to be supplied to during reallocation. - Withdrawals from vaults that are expected to be withdrawn from during reallocation.Sender is expected to pass `assets = type(uint256).max` with the last MarketAllocation of `allocations` to supply all the remaining withdrawn liquidity, which would ensure that `totalWithdrawn` = `totalSupplied`.A supply in a reallocation step will make the reallocation revert if the amount is greater than the net amount from previous steps (i.e. total withdrawn minus total supplied)."},"revokePendingCap(address)":{"details":"Does not revert if there is no pending cap."},"revokePendingMarketRemoval(address)":{"details":"Does not revert if there is no pending vault removal."},"revokePendingTimelock()":{"details":"Does not revert if there is no pending timelock."},"setSupplyQueue(address[])":{"params":{"newSupplyQueue":"is an array of enabled vaults, and can contain duplicate vaults, but it would only increase the cost of depositing to the vault."}},"submitCap(address,uint256)":{"details":"Warning: Reverts if a cap is already pending. Revoke the pending cap to overwrite it.Warning: Reverts if a vault removal is pending.In case the new cap is lower than the current one, the cap is set immediately.For the sake of backwards compatibility, the max allowed cap can either be set to type(uint184).max or type(uint136).max."},"submitGuardian(address)":{"details":"In case there is no guardian, the guardian is set immediately.Warning: Submitting a guardian will overwrite the current pending guardian."},"submitMarketRemoval(address)":{"details":"Warning: Reverts for non-zero cap or if there is a pending cap. A vault is skipped as soon as its supply cap is reached."},"updateWithdrawQueue(uint256[])":{"details":"Warning: Removing a vault with supply will decrease the fee accrued until one of the functions updating `lastTotalAssets` is triggered (deposit/mint/withdraw/redeem/setFee/setFeeRecipient).Warning: `updateWithdrawQueue` is not idempotent. Submitting twice the same tx will change the queue twice.","params":{"indexes":"The indexes of each vault in the previous withdraw queue, in the new withdraw queue's order."}},"withdrawQueue(uint256)":{"details":"Stores the order of vault from which liquidity is withdrawn upon withdrawal.Always contain all non-zero cap vault as well as all vault on which the Earn vault supplies liquidity, without duplicate."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"acceptCap(address)":{"notice":"Accepts the pending cap of the vault."},"acceptGuardian()":{"notice":"Accepts the pending guardian."},"acceptTimelock()":{"notice":"Accepts the pending timelock."},"creator()":{"notice":"The address of the creator."},"curator()":{"notice":"The address of the curator."},"expectedSupplyAssets(address)":{"notice":"Returns the amount of assets expected to be supplied to the strategy vault."},"fee()":{"notice":"The current fee."},"feeRecipient()":{"notice":"The fee recipient."},"guardian()":{"notice":"The current guardian. disrupt the Earn vault's operation, and would have the power to revoke any pending guardian."},"submitMarketRemoval(address)":{"notice":"Submits a forced vault removal from the Earn vault, eventually losing all funds supplied to the vault.This forced removal is expected to be used as an emergency process in case a vault constantly reverts. To softly remove a sane vault, the curator role is expected to bundle a reallocation that empties the vault first (using `reallocate`), followed by the removal of the vault (using `updateWithdrawQueue`)."},"submitTimelock(uint256)":{"notice":"Submits a `newTimelock`."},"supplyQueueLength()":{"notice":"Returns the length of the supply queue."},"timelock()":{"notice":"The current timelock."},"updateWithdrawQueue(uint256[])":{"notice":"Updates the withdraw queue. Some vaults can be removed, but no vault can be added.Removing a vault requires the vault to have 0 supply on it, or to have previously submitted a removal for this vault (with the function `submitMarketRemoval`).Warning: Anyone can supply on behalf of the vault so the call to `updateWithdrawQueue` that expects a vault to be empty can be griefed by a front-run. To circumvent this, the allocator can simply bundle a reallocation that withdraws max from this vault with a call to `updateWithdrawQueue`."},"withdrawQueueLength()":{"notice":"Returns the length of MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://df6f0c459663c9858b6cba2cda1d14a7d05a985bed6d2de72bd8e78c25ee79db","dweb:/ipfs/QmeTTxZ7qVk9rjEv2R4CpCwdf8UMCcRqDNMvzNxHc3Fnn9"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/IERC20Metadata.sol":{"keccak256":"0x70f2f713b13b7ce4610bcd0ac9fec0f3cc43693b043abcb8dc40a42a726eb330","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c13d13304ac79a83ab1c30168967d19e2203342ebbd6a9bbce4db7550522dcbf","dweb:/ipfs/QmeN5jKMN2vw5bhacr6tkg78afbTTZUeaacNHqjWt4Ew1r"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/IERC20Permit.sol":{"keccak256":"0x27dbc90e5136ffe46c04f7596fc2dbcc3acebd8d504da3d93fdb8496e6de04f6","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://0ea8b92e4245d75a5579c10f22f118f7b4ba07c57341f181f0b2a85ff8663de3","dweb:/ipfs/Qme3Ss5ByjmkxxkMdLpyu7fQ1PCtjNFH1wEFszt2BZePiG"]},"src_chain/arbitrum/src/interfaces/IEulerEarn.sol":{"keccak256":"0x55332a582b9ca717b431780e5a4941f0f9996983b71049f52bee430af8858e33","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://ae05bbc4ed4d6660be1e2b1085054a447fb30c9ca7f26f9cd44aa298b1f08531","dweb:/ipfs/QmT23NZGMroqfKXbnvXZvuMkr1cVjCGXxf31X3j5TKKNay"]},"src_chain/arbitrum/src/interfaces/IEulerEarnFactory.sol":{"keccak256":"0xfc2eab7fa3353dfcee8ed8671c22db9329bc5a96125d95a54e498ea2f5cfe7d0","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://4ec6906133d50031ae49470bdc3e430d99e2fc642d0d456ae779dcef1439f1fd","dweb:/ipfs/QmPDy2uMX2qxmCgpvt4uVRMstnXaFmHzx9z4raNLrEjNHG"]},"src_chain/arbitrum/src/libraries/PendingLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb97f23fb860f9f215112388f9a4c700d2572198a41c26a43d487d585a7d3943c","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","urls":["bzz-raw://67cb9a7e8737919f8d705f6572e4bc8e05d3df34bfaa0c9a2a4ccf9df25f6c44","dweb:/ipfs/QmQJEkwu8CXxdxM7BvjCQ9sgeTppY8UDdnkAWmaZw2hxPH"]}},"version":1}

expectedSupplyAssets(address).details: Accounts for internally tracked balance, ignoring direct shares transfer.

lostAssets().details: In order to cover those lost assets, it is advised to supply on behalf of address(1) on the vault (canonical method).

maxWithdrawFromStrategy(address).details: Accounts for internally tracked balance, ignoring direct shares transfer and for assets available in the strategy.

protocolFee().details: The protocol fee is calculated as a percentage of the fee shares that would otherwise go to the fee recipient. When fees are accrued, a portion of the fee shares equal to `protocolFee / WAD` is minted to the protocol fee recipient, and the remaining fee shares are minted to the fee recipient. If `fee()` is 0, then no fee shares are generated, so the protocol fee will have no effect regardless of its value.

reallocate((address,uint256)[]).details: The behavior of the reallocation can be altered by state changes, including: - Deposits on the Earn vault that supplies to vaults that are expected to be supplied to during reallocation. - Withdrawals from the Earn vault that withdraws from vaults that are expected to be withdrawn from during reallocation. - Donations to the vault on vaults that are expected to be supplied to during reallocation. - Withdrawals from vaults that are expected to be withdrawn from during reallocation.Sender is expected to pass `assets = type(uint256).max` with the last MarketAllocation of `allocations` to supply all the remaining withdrawn liquidity, which would ensure that `totalWithdrawn` = `totalSupplied`.A supply in a reallocation step will make the reallocation revert if the amount is greater than the net amount from previous steps (i.e. total withdrawn minus total supplied).

revokePendingCap(address).details: Does not revert if there is no pending cap.

revokePendingMarketRemoval(address).details: Does not revert if there is no pending vault removal.

revokePendingTimelock().details: Does not revert if there is no pending timelock.

params.newSupplyQueue: is an array of enabled vaults, and can contain duplicate vaults, but it would only increase the cost of depositing to the vault.

submitCap(address,uint256).details: Warning: Reverts if a cap is already pending. Revoke the pending cap to overwrite it.Warning: Reverts if a vault removal is pending.In case the new cap is lower than the current one, the cap is set immediately.For the sake of backwards compatibility, the max allowed cap can either be set to type(uint184).max or type(uint136).max.

submitGuardian(address).details: In case there is no guardian, the guardian is set immediately.Warning: Submitting a guardian will overwrite the current pending guardian.

submitMarketRemoval(address).details: Warning: Reverts for non-zero cap or if there is a pending cap. Successfully submitting a zero cap will prevent such reverts.

submitTimelock(uint256).details: Warning: Reverts if a timelock is already pending. Revoke the pending timelock to overwrite it.In case the new timelock is higher than the current one, the timelock is set immediately.

supplyQueue(uint256).details: Stores the order of vaults in which liquidity is supplied upon deposit.Can contain any vault. A vault is skipped as soon as its supply cap is reached.

updateWithdrawQueue(uint256[]).details: Warning: Removing a vault with supply will decrease the fee accrued until one of the functions updating `lastTotalAssets` is triggered (deposit/mint/withdraw/redeem/setFee/setFeeRecipient).Warning: `updateWithdrawQueue` is not idempotent. Submitting twice the same tx will change the queue twice.

params.indexes: The indexes of each vault in the previous withdraw queue, in the new withdraw queue's order.

withdrawQueue(uint256).details: Stores the order of vault from which liquidity is withdrawn upon withdrawal.Always contain all non-zero cap vault as well as all vault on which the Earn vault supplies liquidity, without duplicate.

acceptCap(address).notice: Accepts the pending cap of the vault.

expectedSupplyAssets(address).notice: Returns the amount of assets expected to be supplied to the strategy vault.

guardian().notice: The current guardian. Can be set even without the timelock set.

isAllocator(address).notice: Stores whether an address is an allocator or not.

lastTotalAssets().notice: Stores the total assets managed by this vault when the fee was last accrued.

lostAssets().notice: Stores the missing assets due to realized bad debt or forced vault removal.

maxWithdrawFromStrategy(address).notice: Returns the amount of assets that can be withdrawn from given strategy vault.

permit2Address().notice: The address of the Permit2 contract.

reallocate((address,uint256)[]).notice: Reallocates the vault's liquidity so as to reach a given allocation of assets on each given vault.

revokePendingCap(address).notice: Revokes the pending cap of the vault.

revokePendingMarketRemoval(address).notice: Revokes the pending removal of the vault.

setIsAllocator(address,bool).notice: Sets `newAllocator` as an allocator or not (`newIsAllocator`).

submitGuardian(address).notice: Submits a `newGuardian`.Warning: a malicious guardian could disrupt the Earn vault's operation, and would have the power to revoke any pending guardian.

submitMarketRemoval(address).notice: Submits a forced vault removal from the Earn vault, eventually losing all funds supplied to the vault.This forced removal is expected to be used as an emergency process in case a vault constantly reverts. To softly remove a sane vault, the curator role is expected to bundle a reallocation that empties the vault first (using `reallocate`), followed by the removal of the vault (using `updateWithdrawQueue`).

supplyQueueLength().notice: Returns the length of the supply queue.

updateWithdrawQueue(uint256[]).notice: Updates the withdraw queue. Some vaults can be removed, but no vault can be added.Removing a vault requires the vault to have 0 supply on it, or to have previously submitted a removal for this vault (with the function `submitMarketRemoval`).Warning: Anyone can supply on behalf of the vault so the call to `updateWithdrawQueue` that expects a vault to be empty can be griefed by a front-run. To circumvent this, the allocator can simply bundle a reallocation that withdraws max from this vault with a call to `updateWithdrawQueue`.

withdrawQueueLength().notice: Returns the length of the withdraw queue.
